hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,time,json; stale=[f for f in ['CLAUDE.md','AGENTS.md'] if os.path.exists(f) and time.time()-os.path.getmtime(f)>14*86400]; msg='\n'.join(f'Warning: {f} is over 14 days old — review for staleness' for f in stale); print(json.dumps({'systemMessage':msg}) if msg else '{}')"

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then black "$f" --line-length=100 -q && isort "$f" --profile=black --line-length=100 -q; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*\b(main|master)\b'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Direct push to main/master is blocked. Use a feature branch + PR."}'; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git\s+commit'; then result=$(flake8 src/ --count -q 2>&1 | tail -1); if [ "$result" != "0" ] && [ -n "$result" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"flake8 found $result issue(s). Fix before committing.\"}"; fi; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
